title: Master's Program in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Master's Program in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

Mission

Our mission as an Electrical-Electronics Engineering Master of Science program in our university is to make the best effort to promote intellectual, ethical and technological environment to the students. The department invokes the desire and ability of life-long learning in the students for pursuing a successful career in engineering. The department supports high-quality teaching, research, and services that provide students a supportive environment and will provide suitable forums to enhance the creative talents of students and faculty members.

Vision

Our vision as an Electrical-Electronics Engineering Master of Science program in our university is to conduct original research in all related areas of Electrical-Electronics Engineering. Through original research and high quality education, the students will be prepared as outstanding engineers in the field of Electrical-Electronics Engineering to face the challenges in such disciplines.
